targets.query: SELECT mean("score") AS "score" FROM "Derived RecoveryScore" WHERE $timeFilter AND "MetricClass"='Derived' GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT mean("daily_load") AS "daily_load", mean("acute_7d") AS "acute_7d", mean("chronic_28d") AS "chronic_28d" FROM "Derived TrainingLoad" WHERE $timeFilter AND "MetricClass"='Derived' GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT mean("load_ratio") AS "load_ratio" FROM "Derived TrainingLoad" WHERE $timeFilter AND "MetricClass"='Derived' GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT mean("vo2_estimate") AS "vo2_estimate" FROM "Derived CardioFitness" WHERE $timeFilter AND "MetricClass"='Derived' GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT mean("rhr_delta") AS "rhr_delta", mean("hrv_delta") AS "hrv_delta", mean("sleep_minutes_delta") AS "sleep_minutes_delta", mean("steps_delta") AS "steps_delta" FROM "Derived CorrelationSignals" WHERE $timeFilter AND "MetricClass"='Derived' GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT mean("record_count_last_run") AS "record_count_last_run", mean("minutes_since_success") AS "minutes_since_success" FROM "Derived PipelineHealth" WHERE $timeFilter AND "MetricClass"='Derived' GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
